source_text: When a client offers resumption via a PSK, it SHOULD also supply a "key_share" extension to the server to allow the server to decline resumption and fall back to a full handshake, if needed.
rule_statement: Clients offering PSK resumption SHOULD also include key_share to allow fallback to full handshake.
applies_when: Client offers PSK resumption in ClientHello
checkability_rationale: Can verify key_share is present when pre_shared_key is offered.

source_text: When PSKs are provisioned out of band, the PSK identity and the KDF hash algorithm to be used with the PSK MUST also be provisioned.
rule_statement: Out-of-band PSKs MUST be provisioned with both their identity and the KDF hash algorithm.
expected_value: PSK identity and KDF hash algorithm both provisioned
checkability_rationale: Provisioning requirement; not observable at protocol level.
